# Refrigerated Transport Service (RTS)

> Family-owned reefer and trailer repair shop in Kitchener, Ontario, serving cold-chain fleets across Southwestern Ontario and the Golden Horseshoe. 42 years of hands-on experience with Thermo King and Carrier Transicold refrigeration systems. Owner: Jeff Carson. Address: 1620 Strasburg Rd, Kitchener, ON N2R 1E9. Phone: +1 949 541 5094.

## Services

- [Trailer Service & Repair](https://ianpilon.github.io/rts-kitchener/trailer-service.html): Reefer diagnostics and repair (Thermo King, Carrier Transicold), trailer brakes, lighting, suspension, doors, structural repairs, and mobile on-site service across the KW region.
- [Parts & Accessories](https://ianpilon.github.io/rts-kitchener/parts.html): OEM and aftermarket reefer parts in stock — drive belts, door seals, filters, refrigerant, sensors, brake and suspension components.
- [Refrigerated Trailer Leasing](https://ianpilon.github.io/rts-kitchener/leasing.html): 53-foot reefer trailers for rent. Full specifications: 102⅜" wide, 13'6" high, 65,000 lb GVWR, 55,000 lb payload capacity.

## About

- [About RTS](https://ianpilon.github.io/rts-kitchener/about.html): Family-owned and operated. Multiple service bays, on-site parts inventory, and mobile service capability.
- [Contact](https://ianpilon.github.io/rts-kitchener/contact.html): Address, hours, phone, embedded map with directions.

## Brand facts (machine-readable)

- [brand-facts.json](https://ianpilon.github.io/rts-kitchener/.well-known/brand-facts.json): Structured brand facts for AI agents.
- [sitemap.xml](https://ianpilon.github.io/rts-kitchener/sitemap.xml): Canonical page list.

## Service area

Southwestern Ontario: Windsor, London, Kitchener-Waterloo, Cambridge, Guelph, Sarnia, Chatham-Kent, Brantford, Stratford, Woodstock, St. Thomas, Owen Sound.
Golden Horseshoe: Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Hamilton, Markham, Vaughan, Oakville, Burlington, Oshawa, St. Catharines, Niagara Falls, plus Barrie and Peterborough in the Greater Golden Horseshoe.
